mechanics.excerpt: Largely unexplored and sparsely populated compared with the Inner Sphere, the Periphery has nonetheless played pivotal role in several major interstellar events, including the fall of the Star League_ The Periphery' = reputation as backward and technologi: cally inferior region is only partly true.
